function.name: remember
function.description: Persist a claim into Mnemos for the given run_id. Use this whenever the agent decides to commit a fact to long-term memory; the claim plus its source event and evidence link are all written atomically so the audit trail stays complete.

confidence.description: Confidence in [0, 1]. Defaults to 0.9 when omitted.

kind.description: Claim kind. Defaults to "fact" when omitted.

run_id.description: Tenant scope. Events are stamped with this so run_id-filtered recall (and search_memory) can find the claim.

valid_until.description: Optional RFC3339 timestamp at which the claim should automatically be considered no longer in force.

function.name: forget
function.description: Soft-delete a claim by flipping its status to "deprecated". The text and evidence remain queryable for audit; future recall paths exclude the claim from active context.

claim_id.description: ID of the claim to forget. Status flips to "deprecated"; the claim and its evidence stay queryable for audit.

reason.description: Optional rationale recorded on the status transition.

function.name: update
function.description: Rewrite a claim's text (and optionally its confidence) when the agent's understanding refines. Use when the underlying fact didn't change identity, only wording or precision.

claim_id.description: ID of the claim to rewrite.

confidence.description: Optional new confidence in [0, 1]; omit to keep the current value.

reason.description: Optional rationale recorded on the status transition.

function.name: search_memory
function.description: Semantic search over the agent's memory: embed the query, then rank claims by cosine similarity against the query embedding, restricted to claims under the given run_id (tenant boundary).

min_similarity.description: Drop hits below this cosine similarity threshold (default 0.0).

query.description: Free-text query. Embedded by the configured provider and matched against stored claim embeddings by cosine similarity.

run_id.description: Tenant scope. Required to prevent cross-tenant semantic leakage; only claims linked to events under this run_id are searched.
